Prism
Features Gallery Pricing

Create Without
Boundaries

The next-generation creative platform for designers who refuse to compromise on vision or velocity.

AI-Assisted Design

Generate layouts, color palettes, and typography pairings with intelligent suggestions that learn your style.

Real-time Collaboration

Work together with your team in real-time with multiplayer cursors, comments, and version branching.

One-Click Export

Export production-ready assets for web, iOS, and Android with automatic responsive breakpoints.

What Creators Say

Prism completely transformed our design workflow. The AI suggestions are remarkably good — it feels like having a senior designer looking over your shoulder. We shipped our rebrand in half the time we estimated, and the result was better than anything we'd done before.
Jordan Rivera, Lead Designer at Wavelength

Adaptive Canvas

An infinite canvas that adapts to your workflow — automatically organizing artboards, creating design systems, and maintaining spatial relationships as your project grows.

Smart Components

Components that understand context — auto-adjusting padding, text sizing, and layout when you swap between mobile and desktop breakpoints.

Ready to Create?

Join 5,000 designers already building with Prism.
